1.title: A prophecy restored
1.text: Joseph Smith—Matthew is Joseph Smith's inspired revision of Matthew chapter 24, revealed in 1831. It untangles two events the Savior spoke of together: the fall of Jerusalem and his own Second Coming.

1.question: On the Mount of Olives, what did the disciples privately ask Jesus (JS—Matthew 1:4)?
options: When the temple would be rebuilt
When these things would be, and the sign of his coming and the end of the world
Where he would send them to preach

1.question: According to JS—Matthew 1:6, why will many be deceived?
options: Because false teachers hide in the desert
Because many shall come in Christ's name saying, I am Christ

1.template: Let him who is on the {0} flee

1.question: JS—Matthew 1:12 says the abomination of desolation was spoken of by which prophet?
In JS—Matthew 1:20-21, if someone says 'Lo, here is Christ,' what are the disciples told?
options: To believe him not, for false Christs shall arise

1.question: How does JS—Matthew 1:26 describe the coming of the Son of Man?
options: As a thief in the night
As the light of the morning shining from east to west

1.title: Where the carcass is
1.text: The saying about eagles gathering to the carcass (v. 27) is the Lord's own image for how his elect will be gathered together 'from the four quarters of the earth' — scattered now, but drawn to one place in the last days.

1.question: In JS—Matthew 1:31, before the end comes, what must first happen?
options: This Gospel of the Kingdom shall be preached in all the world

1.question: According to JS—Matthew 1:38-39, who knows the day and hour of the Son of Man's coming?
In JS—Matthew 1:41-43, the coming of the Son of Man is compared to the days of whom?
What lesson does JS—Matthew 1:44-46 draw for the disciples?
options: To watch, for they know not what hour their Lord comes
To fast and pray in secret

1.question: In JS—Matthew 1:47-48, whom does the lord bless when he comes?
options: The servant found watching over the household

1.question: By whose prophecy does JS—Matthew 1:55 say the end of the wicked shall come?
